fields.name: featuredPosts
fields.label: Featured Blog Posts
fields.description: Pick one or many blog posts to promote at the top of the page. Order matters. Leave empty to hide the featured section for blogs.

fields.name: featuredPodcasts
fields.label: Featured Podcast Episodes
fields.description: Pick one or many podcast episodes to promote at the top of the page. Order matters. Leave empty to hide the featured section for podcasts.

fields.name: headingFont
fields.label: Heading Font Family
fields.description: Used for h2/h3 across the site

description.value: References another document, used as a foreign key
